stemHtml: Which of these statements about rudder pedal nose wheel steering is correct?

options.a: Rudder pedal nose wheel steering does not function during take-off.
options.b: Rudder pedal nose wheel steering provides a larger deflection of the nose wheel as manual or tiller control.
options.c: Rudder pedal nose wheel steering functions on the ground as well as in the air.
options.d: Rudder pedal nose wheel steering provides a smaller deflection of the nose wheel compared to the hand wheel steering (tiller).
